query: SELECT DISTINCT c.id, c.code, c.title FROM courses c INNER JOIN lessons l ON c.id = l.courseId WHERE (l.content IS NULL OR l.content = '' OR l.content = 'null');
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2KiCrCqNDFcXt7P.577d1a63eeb5 --database P2Dpw9MQsmxzdUQCfGjV6b --execute SELECT DISTINCT c.id, c.code, c.title FROM courses c INNER JOIN lessons l ON c.id = l.courseId WHERE (l.content IS NULL OR l.content = '' OR l.content = 'null');
